purpose: Public reusable style handprint for Chinese VN/Galgame drafting without exposing private reference sources.
source_policy: No private source names, local paths, full-text corpus, or identifiable reference lines.
style_principles: VN prose is click-after-click relationship change, not decorative prose.
Daily life should carry low-intensity friction, debt, misunderstanding, and callback.
Cuteness comes from pressure-specific deviations, not generic cute particles.
Thought rows show private choice cost, not author commentary.
Narration serves screen state, rhythm, and misread; it does not summarize the theme.

sentence_moves.name: light_banter_to_relationship_debt
sentence_moves.use: A joke or complaint creates a small obligation or softer relation state.

sentence_moves.name: misread_to_private_inference
sentence_moves.use: POV misreads a line, then a concrete object or gesture revises the inference.

sentence_moves.name: consecutive_questions_pressure
sentence_moves.use: Two to four compact questions narrow the escape route without author explanation.

sentence_moves.name: procedure_as_affection
sentence_moves.use: Registration, refund, inspection, repair, or confirmation hides tenderness.

sentence_moves.name: silence_without_explaining
sentence_moves.use: Silence is followed by object/action/task, not translated into theme.

sentence_moves.name: sentence_tail_leak
sentence_moves.use: The speaker tries to keep a mask, but the ending softens, breaks, or changes course.

dialogue_ownership.rule: Do not default to A/B/A/B. Assign temporary pressure ownership.
dialogue_ownership.same_speaker_run: Allowed when each click changes tactic, information, cost, object state, or relationship pressure.
dialogue_ownership.thought_hinge: Thought usually enters after a dialogue block as inference or choice cost.
